mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_cart ( tenant_id, biz_type, user_id, item_count, total_quantity, total_amount, discount_amount, pay_amount, last_sync_time, version, ext_info ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{bizType}, #{userId}, #{itemCount}, #{totalQuantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{version}, #{extInfo} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE item_count = VALUES(item_count), total_quantity = VALUES(total_quantity), total_amount = VALUES(total_amount), discount_amount = VALUES(discount_amount), pay_amount = VALUES(pay_amount), last_sync_time = VALUES(last_sync_time), version = VALUES(version), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted = 0
